events.event: Case auto-created by the Target Visibility Gate, promoted from candidate T-AU-2026-00108 (Risham Nominees Pty Ltd (trading as Centenary Bakehouse)). Promotion required at least one independently verified source_evidence entry — see dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md.
Manual evidence sweep found WorkSafe Victoria's original charging-stage release (16 May 2023), an earlier procedural stage of the same manslaughter matter whose sentencing is already recorded.
